title: Comfort Sunshiny Days Fabric Conditioner with Stay Fresh technology for 100 days of freshness + fragrance* 48 washes (1.44 L)
features: Enjoy 100 days of freshness + fragrance* with Comfort Sunshiny Days Fabric Conditioner
Comfort features Stay Fresh technology which is designed to lock in fragrance, giving clothes 100 days of freshness*
Our Sunshiny Days fabric softener leaves your clothes smelling fresh with long-lasting fragrance notes of zesty orange and floral jasmine with a musky cedarwood base
Let our fabric conditioner drift you off into a summery daydream, carried away by a floaty cotton dress to daisy-covered meadows kissed by the sun
Comfort Fabric Conditioner helps to smooth the fibres of your clothes, making them feel extra soft, and it comes in a recyclable bottle**
Let the fresh fragrance bursts of Comfort Fabric Conditioner take you to a happy place because when your clothes smell good, you feel good – all day long
description: Product Description We know you love your clothes. We love clothes too, and we want to help you to care for them. That’s why we’ve developed Comfort Creations Sunshiny Days Fabric Conditioner to keep clothes fresh and clean long after each wash. Our fabric softener features Stay Fresh technology, designed to lock in fragrance, to deliver 100 days of freshness + fragrance*. This fabric softener features a long-lasting fragrance combining zesty orange and floral jasmine with a musky cedarwood base to leave your clothes smelling fresh and clean. Let the fresh fragrance bursts of Comfort Fabric Conditioner take you to a happy place because when your clothes smell good, you feel good – all day long. How to use: Dose straight into your washing machine drawer. Do not pour directly onto fabrics. Wash hands after use. You do not need to dilute. Add Comfort to your wash to help protect your clothes and leave you feeling great inside and outside every day. Comfort is the original fabric conditioner in the UK and has been caring for clothes for over 50 years. Comfort Fabric Conditioner also ensures your clothes smell their very best, wash after wash. Together, we can help protect the clothes you love. *After storage and line drying **Remove sleeve Ingredients 5-15%: Cationic Surfactants. <5%: Perfume, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate. Directions Dose straight into your washing machine drawer. Do not pour directly onto fabrics. Wash hands after use. You do not need to dilute. Manufacturer Contact Information Comfort, Freepost ADM1000, London, SW1A 2XX Unilever Ireland, 20 Riverwalk, National Digital Park, Citywest, Dublin 24. See more
